name: HubSpot — List Contacts
description: Fetches recent contacts from HubSpot CRM

script.value:
import os, json
from hubspot import HubSpot
from hubspot.crm.contacts import SimplePublicObjectInput

token = os.environ.get('HUBSPOT_TOKEN', '')
api_client = HubSpot(access_token=token)

contacts = api_client.crm.contacts.basic_api.get_page(limit=10, archived=False)

result = []
for contact in contacts.results:
    props = contact.properties
    result.append({
        'id': contact.id,
        'email': props.get('email', ''),
        'firstname': props.get('firstname', ''),
        'lastname': props.get('lastname', ''),
        'company': props.get('company', '')
    })

print(json.dumps({'count': len(result), 'contacts': result}))
